indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space lacks the privacy needed for focused solo work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or seating options are present that would allow for ergonomic positioning while working.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space lacks the privacy needed for focused work, and there is no flat personal work surface or ergonomic seating available. The ambient lighting is insufficient for screen work, making it difficult to maintain focus and productivity.
